name: Bellaire Pickleball
description: Bellaire Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bossier City, LA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to lights, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Cypress Baptist
description: Cypress Baptist is a place to play pickleball in Benton, LA. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and water.

name: Just Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Just Pickleball in Bossier City, LA! There are 5 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Members only — $15 non member drop in fee.

name: Shady Grove Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Shady Grove Community Center in Bossier City, LA! There is 1 indoor wood court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The court is free. The court cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms.
